name: elon-musk
description: Elon Musk method skills for setup, strategy, engineering, teams, risk, execution, memory refresh, review packs, and handoff.

interface.shortDescription: x-prefixed skills for setup, strategy, engineering, teams, risk, memory, review packs, and handoff.
interface.longDescription: A compact skill plugin with 20 searchable x-prefixed skills. Use it to check installation, run bounded review packs, route messy problems, question requirements, simplify plans, review teams and organizations, inspect risk, turn ambitious missions into staged execution, save reusable lessons, refresh local method memory, and write continuation handoffs.
defaultPrompt: Use $x-setup to check whether this plugin is installed and visible.
Use $x-review-pack to review this plan and close the loop.
